title: Pure nested AD (derivative^d / gradient^d) silently returns 0 at nesting depth >= 3
goal: Found by the depth-parametric AD oracle (P6a, scripts/gen_ad_depth.py), verified on -r AND AOT (identical). derivative^d and gradient^d of a polynomial are exact at d=1,2 and return an EXACT 0 (silent wrong value, not a crash) at every d >= 3. Minimal repro (tests/ad_depth/found/esh_0118_nested_ad_depth3_zero.esk): (define (p x)(* x x x x x x x x)); d2 = (derivative (lambda(a)(derivative p a)) 2.0) = 3584 CORRECT; d3 = (derivative (lambda(a)(derivative (lambda(b)(derivative p b)) a)) 2.0) = 0 WRONG (expected 10752); gradient^3 of x^3 also = 0 (expected 6). Independent of shape (mono/poly/exp/sin), binding (inline/named/lamvar), and operator (derivative or gradient). Root-cause hypothesis: the forward jet carries only TWO tangent levels (value + d1 + d2 mixed), so the third-order nesting produces no coefficient and collapses to 0. This is DISTINCT from ESH-0117 (which is reverse-outer over nested-forward with a vector param); ESH-0118 is pure forward^d / reverse^d on a scalar with no capture.
detection_gap: The P3 AD oracle only tested nesting depth <= 2 (dofd/gofd/gofg are all 2-level). Nothing swept the nesting depth parametrically, so derivative^3+ was never exercised. FIXED by pillar P6a: scripts/gen_ad_depth.py now sweeps every AD composition at d=1..8 with analytic ground truth and records max-correct-depth; scripts/run_ad_depth.sh gates it (ICC oracle ad-depth).
acceptance: derivative^3 of x^8 at 2.0 returns 10752 (-r AND AOT); gradient^3 of x^3 at 2.0 returns 6; the depth-parametric oracle deriv/gradn capnone cells reach max-correct-depth >= 3 (ideally 8); no regression to ad_oracle / nested_ad / SICP
